videos.headline: O.J. Howard has the game of his life
videos.description: Alabama tight end O.J. Howard hauls in three catches of 50-plus yards, two for touchdowns.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (O.J. Howard has the game of his life) 2016/01/11 ESHEET

videos.headline: Clemson can't haul in the tying TD
videos.description: Deshaun Watson throws to Artavis Scott, who appears to catch the touchdown in the end zone, but Alabama's Ronnie Harrison knocks the ball away, forcing Clemson to settle for a field goal.

videos.headline: Saban takes a Gatorade bath
videos.description: In the final seconds of Alabama's 45-40 win over Clemson, coach Nick Saban gets drenched by Gatorade as the Crimson Tide celebrate their fourth national title in the last seven years.

videos.headline: Saban: 'We did the things that we needed to do'
videos.description: Alabama coach Nick Saban joins SVP to explain the decision to go for an onside kick in the fourth quarter and how he felt about Clemson QB Deshaun Watson's performance.

videos.headline: Herbstreit on Saban: 'If you know him, it's not enough'
videos.description: Kirk Herbstreit joins SVP to discuss the drive that makes Nick Saban such a hard worker, resulting in four national titles for Alabama in the last seven years.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Herbstreit on Saban) 2016/01/11 SVP SC

videos.headline: Herbie on title game: 'This is what you hope for'
videos.description: Kirk Herbstreit joins Scott Van Pelt to break down Alabama's victory over Clemson in the College Football Playoff National Championship game.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Herbie on title game: 'This is what you hope for') 2016/01/11 SVP SC

videos.headline: Kenny Mayne on location in Alabama: 'This place went nuts'
videos.description: Scott Van Pelt talks with Kenny Mayne about the atmosphere inside the Innisfree Irish Pub after Alabama recovered the onside kick against Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Kenny Mayne on location in Alabama: 'This place went nuts') 106/01/11 SVP SC

videos.headline: Mack Brown on onside kick: 'It was the difference in the ball game'
videos.description: Mack Brown says Alabama had to switch the momentum of the game, which led to the decision to go for an onside kick in the fourth quarter, resulting in an O.J. Howard 51-yard touchdown pass.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Mack Brown on onside kick: 'It was the difference in the ball game') 2016/01/11 ESHEET SVP SC

videos.headline: Golic: Watson held his own against Alabama defense
videos.description: ESPN's Mike Greenberg and Mike Golic react to Alabama's 45-40 victory over Clemson in the College Football Playoff National Championship and highlight Clemson QB Deshaun Watson's standout performance.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Golic: Watson held his own against Alabama defense) 2016/01/12 ESHEET M&M PVC

videos.headline: Pollack: Alabama's 'underdog role' paid off
videos.description: ESPN college football analyst David Pollack joins Mike & Mike to explain how Alabama's role as the "underdog" worked to their advantage in the National Championship game against Clemson.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Pollack: Alabama’s ‘underdog role’ paid off) 2016/01/12 M&M PVC

videos.headline: Caliendo's many voices react to Alabama's big win
videos.description: Comedian Frank Caliendo joins Mike & Mike to impersonate the National Championship reactions of Jon Gruden, Lou Holtz and First Take's Stephen A. Smith.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Caliendo’s many voices react to Alabama’s big win) 2016/01/12 M&M PVC

videos.headline: Le Batard: Saban's like Jordan; he always wins
videos.description: Dan Le Batard and Stugotz react to Alabama beating Clemson 45-40 in the College Football Playoff National Championship and explain how Alabama coach Nick Saban successfully wins national titles without an outstanding quarterback.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Le Batard: Saban’s like Jordan; he always wins) 2016/01/12 Le Batard Show PVC

videos.headline: Le Batard shuts down Saban G.O.A.T. talk
videos.description: The Dan Le Batard Show fires back at listeners who believe the show is not dedicating enough time to talking about Alabama's 45-40 victory over Clemson and Alabama coach Nick Saban's greatness in the national title game.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Analysis (Le Batard shuts down Saban G.O.A.T. talk) 2016/01/12 Le Batard Show PVC

videos.headline: Dabo: 'They took advantage of opportunities'
videos.description: Clemson coach Dabo Swinney assesses his team's second-half performance that included multiple defensive mistakes that Alabama was able to capitalize on.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (Dabo: 'They took advantage of opportunities') 2016/01/11 ESHEET SC

videos.headline: Miscues doom Watson, Clemson
videos.description: Clemson quarterback Deshaun Watson explains how miscues and missed opportunities contributed in the loss to Alabama.
